title: Energy Transition and Emerging Technology Companies are Set to Present at the 28th Annual EnerCom Denver - The Energy Investment Conference, to be held August 13-16, 2023, in Denver, Colorado
text: Presentation Times and Schedule for All Participating Companies Now Posted on the Conference Website   www.enercomdenver.com  – Presenting Companies Continue to be Added Investor One-on-One Meeting Requests for All Companies Now Open for Institutional Investors, Portfolio Managers, Financial Analysts, CIOs, and Other Investment Industry Professionals Investors, Analysts, and Energy Industry Professionals Can Still Register to Attend EnerCom Denver – The Energy Investment Conference at www.enercomdenver.com DENVER , July 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- EnerCom, Inc. announces companies that will be presenting during The Energy Transition and Emerging Technology Session, focused on energy-related technology, alternative energy and traditional oil and gas technology start-up ventures, on Wednesday, August 16 th.  Companies Presenting in The Energy Transition and Emerging Energy Technology Session as of July 26, 2023, include: LiTHOS - (CNSX: AMS.CN) aims to be the leader in the application of Direct Lithium Extraction (DLE) technology for economic, environmentally efficient, and sustainable lithium production.

title: Earnings Preview: APA (APA) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: APA (APA) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Why APA (APA) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: APA (APA) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: APA Corporation Publishes 2023 Sustainability Report
text: HOUSTON, July 11, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) today published its 2023 Sustainability Report. Highlights from the report include the achievement of key Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) goals in 2022 and progression of the company's ESG initiatives and long-term emissions reduction efforts. The full report is available on APA's website.

title: 10 Stocks Will Make You 30% Richer Than Others In A Year, Analysts
text: Analysts have the typical hopes for the S&P 500 in the next 12 months. But they're especially bullish on a small handful of stocks.

title: APA Corporation Provides Second-Quarter 2023 Supplemental Information and Schedules Results Conference Call for August 3 at 10 a.m. Central Time
text: HOUSTON, July 10, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) today provided supplemental information regarding certain second-quarter 2023 financial and operational results. This information is intended only to provide additional information regarding current estimates management believes will affect results for the second-quarter 2023. It is provided to assist investors, analysts, and others in formulating their own estimates, and is not intended to be a comprehensive presentation of all factors that will affect second-quarter 2023 results. Actual results and the impact of factors identified here may vary depending on the impact of other factors not identified here and are subject to finalization of the financial reporting process for second-quarter 2023.
